---
name: add-community-extension
description: 'Add a community extension to the Spec Kit catalog from a GitHub issue submission.'
argument-hint: 'GitHub issue URL or number for the extension submission'
---

# Add Community Extension

Process an extension submission issue and add or update it in the community catalog.

See the full skill documentation at [github/spec-kit](https://github.com/github/spec-kit/blob/main/.github/skills/add-community-extension/SKILL.md).
